title: Night Vision plugin
description: Toggle night vision instantly with a single command — no OptiFine or mods required! Perfect for survival and server players.
body:
🌙 Night Vision Toggle Plugin (Minecraft 1.21.8+)

This lightweight Night Vision Toggle Plugin lets players easily enable or disable night vision with a simple /nightvision command.
No more fumbling with potions or commands — just type once to see clearly, and again to return to normal vision.

Perfect for builders, explorers, and survival players who want smooth lighting control without using OptiFine or external mods.

🧠 Features

✨ Toggle Night Vision Easily
Use /nightvision to switch night vision ON or OFF instantly.

⚙️ Player-Specific System
Night vision applies per-player, so everyone can choose their own visibility setting.

💡 No Potions or Mods Needed
Purely handled by server-side effects — no OptiFine, no resource packs, no client mods.

🌐 Multiplayer Compatible
Works perfectly in SMP worlds, realms, or public servers.

⚡ Lightweight and Lag-Free
Only runs when the player executes the command — zero impact on performance.
